title: otholobium wilmsii
intro: Otholobium wilmsii, also known as Wilms' vetchling, is a small, annual or biennial plant in the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and other urological issues due to its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Otholobium wilmsii include its ability to reduce urine acidity, alleviate symptoms of kidney stones, and provide relief from urinary tract infections. Otholobium wilmsii is often prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, and its roots and leaves are used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
